description: Carrd was a lifesaver for me. I spent a significant amount of time and resources trying various programs to build a simple website for my business. Once I found Carrd I had a website live in no time.
author: Stephanie W.
pros: I liked that it had lots of free templates, was easy and intuitive to use, and helped me get my website online within hours.
cons: I wish that the templates were more customizable and that there was a way to have edits pending without taking the website offline.

description: I like it a lot, I need to create several smaller websites for clients and what Carrd can produce for me satisfies all my client's needs at a price we're all happy with.
author: James C.
pros: The pricing structure is very good when you need several billboard (low function, high graphic) websites. Carrd is also feature-rich and competes well with other services
cons: Click and drag snaps too easily, making it difficult to make subtle changes without pushing everything.

description: My overall experience with Carrd was ok but I’ve used better sites for the same purpose.
author: Marko P.
pros: What I liked most about Carrd was its interface.
cons: What I liked least about Carrd was its difficulty I’d use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Carrd Is One of My Most Used Platforms For A Reason
description: I use Carrd regularly and have had the best experience based on time-to-deploy, simplicity of use and cost. If you have clients that need quick sites - this is the way to go.
author: Miles T.
pros: Inexpensive, capable, and feature rich NoCode platform for building landing pages, portfolios or other single-page sites. It really does not get easier and there is a huge amount of design flexibility to build most anything you need.
cons: It's not a full-fledged NoCode platform with all the bells and whistles. Yes it is limited in what it can do and if you need to build something more complex like a blog or social network then you'll certainly have to bring in 3rd party tools, but for what it is - it gets a lot done, well.

review_title: For one page websites, Carrd is the way to go.
description: I really like it and will continue using it for my website needs from now on.
author: Lori R.
pros: Affordable. For one reasonable fee a year, I can build the websites I need to manage my author business.
cons: Some of the customization is a little confusing.

description: Overall I am very pleased with Carrd! I use it as my landing site, a link hub, an about me page, an advertising space, and a home for my TOS - and that is just with using one of the 3 free slots you get!
author: Percival F.
pros: I LOVE how freaking customizable Carrd is! I can do anything I need with it, and have it be perfectly unique! It offers templates, or a blank workspace to start form scratch, as well as a community of people who share their templates/code.
cons: It can be a little user-unfriendly at the start, and lacks an immersive tutorial. It also holds a few things behind a paywall, but they aren't so important that a site is dependent on those things.

review_title: Carrd is the perfect landing or link-in-bio page builder
description: My overall experience has been great with Carrd. Just so easy and really good-looking. I was able to create the website so quickly that the people I work with in the non-profit were shocked and then shocked again at how awesome it looked. I have a few other website landing pages I am putting together and I will be using Carrd for all of them.
author: Jennifer Y.
pros: I love how easy Carrd is to build with and publish. Everything was just very intuitive. It took me longer to add my information then it did to do the work of building and launching.
cons: I don't have any cons so far, but I have only been using it for a few weeks.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Carrd a easy website to use and work with, perfect for almost anything
description: I use Carrd to present my websites or social media, is very helpful and the pro lite version is very cheap only for 9 US for a year
author: Luis Humberto A.
pros: Works PERFECT, easy to use and understand, the respond time of the site is super fast, works perfect in any pc, the aesthetic of the site is beautiful, you can use a template if you want to or you can just make you're site like you want, the lowest price for the pro version are 9 US for a YEAR that's excellent
cons: I don't find anything bad about the website.

description: I am happy with the pricing and I am able to build basic websites and landing pages with carrd however building a complex website on carrd is impossible.
author: Masego H.
pros: The templates are a winner, easy to use the best value for money.
cons: The absence of a pop-up menu stands out for me, this is one feature that I struggle with. Carrd can add more templates that have basic features that make websites easy to use, like the pop-up menu and a feature to add pages with ease.

review_title: The best landing page builder for someone on a tight budget
description: I am generally very satisfied with Carrd. There is not really a feature that I miss. All in all it is a great landing page builder for someone looking for an inexpensive option.
author: Kevin V.
pros: The cost is by far the best part about Carrd. Carrd generally is very easy to use and has a lot of high quality templates. Carrd also continuously adds new template.
cons: So far I haven't encountered anything that I don't like about Carrd. If I had to name one thing then more integrations would be great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Love it! I have developed several landing pages. Super easy to create on my own.
author: Karen B.
pros: Excellent source to create a landing page. The ease of use is amazing!
cons: It's difficult to space when it's 2 columns a page. If you move one column it moves the other column. (not a deal breaker, but can be tedious)
author_profession: Jungian Life Coach and Certified Grief Educator

description: Carrd allows you to build simple, good-looking websites for pretty much any use case without having to know how to code, without dealing with complex page builders, without having to read a manual to know how it works, and with all the necessary extra features to make fully-fledged websites (it even allows you to edit the CSS of the page and add custom scripts). It does all of this through a very affordable subscription.
author: Juan G.
pros: Have been using Carrd sites for many purposes some of those are focused landing pages, email opt-in forms, collections of links, and so on.It's by far the easiest and most user-friendly page builder than doesn't overwhelm you with options, has a great UX, provides you with a lot of features for customization, and allows you to add extra features to go from simple page to fully-functional website.And it also has a range of other services it integrates with. The one with email providers is very smooth and easy to use.
cons: I really wish there was more variety in the type of templates and not just for a particular type or a similar style with a different structure and different colors.

description: Mi experiencia fue excelente bien inmersa es súper económica me gusta por qué aparte así me da mucho tiempo para ocuparme en otras cosas.
author: Leslie A.
pros: Me gusta por qué yo mismo puedo gestionar como diseñar mi página web y en ese caso me fascinas por qué es muy sencilla la herramienta y así es mejor.
cons: Puntos flacos de la herramienta no tiene para mí es un 10/10

review_title: Crea una landing page de forma sencilla
description: Me encanta lo fácil que funciona y lo bien pensado que está. Si buscas una web pequeña y sin complicarte esta herramienta es para ti
author: oscar M.
pros: Carrd permite hacer pequeñas páginas o landings muy fácil. En unas horas puedes tener una landing plenamente funcional.
cons: Tiene pocas características y está limitado en funcionalidades. Pero quizá esa pega es lo que lo hace fácil y rápido de usar

review_title: A landing and portfolio page giant
description: For the cost of a basic dinner out each year, you can create and host 25 one page websites that have great speed, unlimited bandwidth, integrations, and reliability. For solopreneurs, entrepreneurs, and SMBs, this service is a no brainer.
author: Tyler G.
pros: Carrd allows users of all levels to quickly build, design, and launch one page websites with ease. My favorite feature is the generous and robust video module on the paid plans.
cons: Carrd does have limitations in terms of design that I hope are fixed. The inability to nest containers inside each other greatly limits layout options and styling.

author: Yosue V.
pros: Puedes crear tu página web en minutos con Carrd, tiene una versión gratuita bien amplia que puedes usar sin problemas y crear tu página muy fácilmente
cons: Hay varias desventajas de crear tu web con Carrd, si quieres dominios 100% personalizable debes pagar su plan Pro, además de que puedes crear cierta cantidad de páginas webs, 3.10 o más dependiendo del plan. En lo personal prefiero hacerla yo mismo o pedirle a alguna agencia de diseño web, ya que permite mucha más personalización y opciones por ese precio o menos
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Muy económica para todo lo que ofrece
description: Es una aplicación super facil de usar y recomiendo a todos que probéis la prueba gratuita de 7 dias, ya que ni siquiera tienes que añadir tu tarjeta de credito y puedes utilizarla con normalidad.
author: Ana P.
pros: Me encanta lo económica que es para todo lo que ofrece, además de tener una versión gratuita que me sirvio para probarla previo a contratarla. Tiene un funcionamiento muy bueno y sencillo y una interfaz muy limppia
cons: Lo unico que no me ha gustado es que no cuenta con un sistema de comercio electronico incorporado por lo que no puedo crear una tienda online

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love that Carrd is very beginner friendly! You don't need to know a thing about coding to build an astonishing website at all! Just choose from their huge selection of templates or design, etc. and you're good to go! It's also drag and drop, and few modification of settings. Best thing is that everything you need for a functional website is absolutely free. You can build any website, with any design and layout of your choice, free of charge.
cons: In the free version, Carrd has a limit on how many blocks you can add per website, however. Although there's that limit, it's not exactly an obstacle for me. I can still create pleasing, functional websites without payment. If given a chance though, I would definitely buy Carrd's subscription in order to fully experience everything Carrd has to offer.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Best for quick and beautiful landing page
description: Carrd is easy to use, has great templates, perfect integration with all the necessary software, i don't need anything else from a Landing page builder.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Easy to use 2. Drag& drop 3. Beautiful Responsive templates 4. Easy to set up with mailing software (i used Email Octopus)5. Great set up with custom domain 6. Captcha added Eady7. Google analytics easy! So many great points! Saved me ton of time!
cons: I really don't know what to write here. I lovd everything about Carrd. i still haven't used too much and i haven't found out about all the features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Carrd has saved me so much time that I have spent on building my business, and for that I'm truly grateful. I would recommend this product to anyone, new or experienced, who needs a simple landing page or website.
author: Ivan G.
pros: This product is extremely economical, coming in at only 19 dollars a year. It also is extremely easy to pick up and learn, since they have lots of documentation. Their customer support is great and resolved an issue I was having within a day. The integrations with Stripe make this a perfect landing page for any entrepreneur.
cons: The only real gripe I have with the software is the loading times it has for sectioned websites. For example, my website has maybe 7 or 8 sections and is starting to noticeably slow down especially for tablets or phones.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great to make landing pages and also websites
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's easy to create landing pages and build simple websites
cons: It's quite easy to use. More integrations would be great
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Muy satisfactoria
author: Sergio L.
pros: La simplicidad a la hora de hacer las cosas
cons: Le falta implementar más opciones de diseño
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Antonio S.
pros: Tiene un montón de plantillas y todas con la cualidad de responsive, teniendo en cuenta la filosofía de mobile first a la hora de hacer frontend, es una clarísima ventaja, además es barato y con sus plantillas ya partes de la base de que lo que estás modificando es lo que a la vez verás en producción
cons: Si el sitio web es un tanto pesado, a carrd le cuesta cargar imágenes y vídeos y parece que no se lleva muy bien con el SEO.

review_title: Una form fácil de crear páginas web sencillas y bonitas
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: La facilidad y la rapidez con la que se puede crear una página web de una sola pantalla, sin necesidad de saber programar ni diseñar.
cons: Si se quiere hacer algo más complejo o interactivo, Carrd no es la mejor opción
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: I've used this tool to prototype landing pages and design customer websites and I'm very happy with the results.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is one of the easiest and most intuitive landing page builders I've used. The provided templates have excellent design and you can quickly build a nice-looking landing page.
cons: It lacks some flexibility in terms of integrations with other tools but, other than that, it's definitely a good choice.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
